faqs.question: Why are silverfish so common in Flatlands homes?
faqs.answer: Flatlands' proximity to Marine Park and Jamaica Bay creates higher humidity levels that silverfish love. Many homes in the area have basements, older plumbing, and crawl spaces that provide the damp, dark environments where silverfish thrive. Our treatments target these moisture-prone areas specifically.
